title: Adam or Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Adam or Lilith?             Quote Post by GoGoGengar » Sun Jul 31, 2011 5:32 am I've watched all 26 episodes of Neon Genesis Evangelion, End of Evangelion, Death and Rebirth and both of the Rebuilds. In all of them Adam is this: However, I've recently been reading the Evangelion manga and I found this: It doesn't look like a translation error because they called it "Adam" on other occasions. Please, explain.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 31, 2011 5:44 am Read more of the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by MandarinOrange » Sun Jul 31, 2011 10:42 am And in episode 15 of the anime, Misato does the same thing. She believes that it is Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by TokioPunk483 » Sun Jul 31, 2011 4:11 pm Kaji and Misato both thought Lilith was Adam, making us believe it was Adam, and Kaworu was the first person to correctly identify the being in Terminal Dogma as Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by GoGoGengar » Sun Jul 31, 2011 7:44 pm I am enlightened :) It's been quite a while since I last treated my eyes with such a gift as Evangelion. Memory fail. Sorry if this thread is an inconvenience in any way

[]: Re: Adam or Lilith?             Quote Post by Petrucio » Sun Jul 31, 2011 8:42 pm GoGoGengar wrote: ... and both of the Rebuilds.

[]:             Quote Post by DanYeomans » Sun Jul 31, 2011 11:54 pm If you don't remember, in episode 24, Kaworu comes to a realization that the being in Terminal Dogma is in fact Lilith, and this is also affirmed in End of Evangelion. Adam is best associated with two things: The Giant of Light, and The Embryo Kaji delivers to Gendo.

[]: Re: Adam or Lilith?             Quote Post by GoGoGengar » Mon Aug 01, 2011 7:40 am Petrucio wrote: No you didn't, in Rebuild, the thing inside this little pandora box has an entirely different shape and name.

[]: Re: Adam or Lilith?             Quote Post by Petrucio » Mon Aug 01, 2011 8:06 am GoGoGengar wrote: Either way, my doubt is cleared.
